ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: "CUST-" ++ (payload.sfdc_id default "UNKNOWN"), firstName: payload.first_name default "", lastName: payload.last_name default "", email: lower(payload.email_address default ""), phone: if (payload.phone_number == null or payload.phone_number == "") null else if ((payload.phone_number default "") startsWith "+") payload.phone_number else "+" ++ payload.phone_number, status: payload.account_status match { case "A" -> "active" case "I" -> "inactive" case "S" -> "suspended" else -> "unknown" }, createdDate: (payload.created_date as String) default null }

when.expression: #[payload.firstName == null or payload.firstName == '' or payload.lastName == null or payload.lastName == '' or payload.email == null or payload.email == '' or !(payload.email matches /^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$/)]

raise-error.description: Required fields missing or invalid. firstName, lastName, and a valid email are required.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { first_name: payload.firstName, last_name: payload.lastName, email_address: lower(payload.email), phone_number: if ((payload.phone default "") startsWith "+") payload.phone else if (payload.phone != null and payload.phone != "") "+" ++ payload.phone else null }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { id: "CUST-" ++ ($.sfdc_id default "UNKNOWN"), firstName: $.first_name default "", lastName: $.last_name default "", email: lower($.email_address default ""), phone: if (($.phone_number default "") startsWith "+") ($.phone_number default "") else if ($.phone_number != null and $.phone_number != "") "+" ++ $.phone_number else null, status: $.account_status match { case "A" -> "active" case "I" -> "inactive" case "S" -> "suspended" else -> "unknown" }, createdDate: ($.created_date as String) default null }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND", message: "Customer with the requested ID was not found", timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "VALIDATION_ERROR", message: error.description, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE", message: "The upstream service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry after 30 seconds.", timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "VALIDATION_ERROR", message: error.description, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "UNAUTHORIZED", message: "Authentication is required to access this resource", timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: { code: "INTERNAL_ERROR", message: "An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support with the correlationId.", timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, correlationId: correlationId } }
